docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-31-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALAN DUANE FOSTER'S MOTION TO GRANT PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 15, 2012 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. THE ATTORNEY GENERAL TO PREPARE A STATEMENT OF DECISION WHICH REFLECTS THE TENTATIVE RULING OF THE COURT, TO BE SUBMITTED BY FEBRUARY 10, 2012. OBJECTION TO THE STATEMENT OF DECISION TO BE SUBMITTED BY FEBRUARY 15, 2012. THE STAY ON THE SUSPENSION OF THE DRIVER'S LICENSE IS EXTENDED UNTIL THE ISSUANCE OF THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALAN DUANE FOSTER'S MOTIONS FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING JUDGMENT, AND IF DENIED, FOR A NEW TRIAL. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. MR. FOSTER HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT GROUNDS FOR THIS COURT TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT OR GRANT HIS REQUEST OF A NEW TRIAL. THE COURT CONSIDERED THE ENTIRE RECORD IN ISSUING THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtns For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Judgment, And If Denied, For A New Trial; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ALAN DUANE FOSTER'S MOTIONS FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING JUDGMENT, AND IF DENIED, FOR A NEW TRIAL.

Appearances: Geoffrey Rotwein (397.0860) for petitioner and moving party; Jennifer Perkell of the Attorney General's Office (510.622.2211) for respondent and opposing party.

Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Mr. Foster has not presented sufficient grounds for this Court to set aside and vacate judgment or grant his request of a new trial. The Court considered the entire record in issuing the Statement of Decision. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Intention To Move For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Judgment And If Denied, For A New Trial; Pos

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ALAN DUANE FOSTER'S NOTICE OF INTENTION TO MOVE FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING JUDGMENT AND IF DENIED, FOR A NEW TRIAL.
This matter is off calendar. Duplicate entry. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice To Grant Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ALAN DUANE FOSTER's Notice To Grant Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission. The court has received the proposed statement of decision submitted by respondent. Petitioner has until the end of the day February 15 to submit any objections to the proposed statement of decision submitted by respondent. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice To Grant Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Continued To Feb-15-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GEOFFREY ROTWEIN, TEL. NO. 397-0860 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. JENNIFER PERKELL, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. (510) 622-2211 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; A REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION WAS REQUESTED AND DONE IN A TIMELY MANNER IN OPEN COURT AND WILL BE FILED TODAY. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER ALAN DUANE FOSTER'S Motion to Grant Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 15, 2012 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. The Attorney General to prepare a Statement of Decision which reflects the tentative ruling of the court, to be submitted by February 10, 2012. Objection to the Statement of Decision to be submitted by February 15, 2012. The stay on the suspension of the driver's license is extended until the issuance of the Statement of Decision. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/HK
